backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining Project and User types, state management, and public API endpoints for user profiles, project CRUD, and Stripe integration. Includes authorization mixins and blob storage support.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that upgrades OldProject records to NewProject by adding default `engineeringInputs` and `brandingSettings` fields while preserving all other state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (cladding system, secondary structural members, 3D accessories) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of key frontend files including App.tsx, ProjectViewer.tsx, PaymentFailure.tsx, ClearanceCheckBox.tsx, and useQueries.ts.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the PEB-Sim React app, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for login, dashboard, project viewer, pricing, and payment success/failure pages, wrapped in a dark ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/AccessoryControl: UI panel component with toggle switches for building accessories (ventilators, gutters, doors, X-bracing) and a per-bay checkbox selector for braced bays.
frontend/src/components/BrandingControls: UI panel component for building branding settings, providing a signage text input with toggle and RAL color pickers for roof, wall, trim, and structure colors.
Renders a single structural building element (column, rafter, etc.) as a Three.js cylinder mesh with type-based colors and radii, including a bounce fly-in animation on visibility change.
Renders centered 3D text signage at a given position using @react-three/drei's Text3D, with configurable color and visibility.
frontend/src/components/BuildingSimulato: Main 3D building simulator component that composes a React Three Fiber Canvas scene with structural members, cladding, accessories, environment, shadow study, walkthrough, and clearance check based on provided building and UI state props.
frontend/src/components/CladdingControls: UI card component providing toggle switches for roof/wall cladding, skylight mode, secondary members, and a radio group for selecting the cladding profile (Trapezoidal or Standing Seam).
frontend/src/components/CladdingSystem.t: Renders roof slope and wall plane meshes with tiled cladding textures (trapezoidal or standing seam), supporting skylight transparency mode and configurable colors.
frontend/src/components/ClearanceCheckBo: Renders a draggable 3D bounding box representing a vehicle preset inside the building, turning red when it collides with structural members and green when clear.
frontend/src/components/ClearanceCheckCo: UI card for enabling the clearance check feature and selecting a vehicle preset (Truck or Forklift), displaying the preset's dimensions and usage instructions.
frontend/src/components/CreateProjectFor: A dialog form component for creating new projects by entering a name and uploading a DXF file or using a sample building, with status tracking through creation, parsing, and processing steps.
frontend/src/components/DoorsAndShutters: A Three.js React component that renders 3D door and shutter meshes on specified building wall sides based on normalized position placements.
frontend/src/components/EngineeringInput: A form card component for inputting engineering load parameters including wind speed, seismic zone, and live load values.
frontend/src/components/EngineeringPanel: A panel component that displays calculated engineering summary stats (steel weight, sheeting area, design status) and provides a BOQ CSV download button.
frontend/src/components/EnvironmentContr: A card UI component with radio buttons for selecting the ground surface texture type (Concrete, Asphalt, or Grass) in the 3D environment.
frontend/src/components/EnvironmentScene: A Three.js React component that renders a textured ground plane and a dynamic sky with sun position calculated from a time-of-day value.
frontend/src/components/GuttersAndDownsp: A Three.js React component that renders perimeter eave gutters and evenly spaced downspouts along both sides of a building.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout component providing a sticky navigation header with logo, nav links, user profile display, and logout functionality, with redirect logic for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that collects a new user's display name and optional email, then saves the profile via a mutation hook with loading and error toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/ProjectLimitWarn: Displays a warning banner when a user has reached the 2-project free tier limit, with an upgrade button that navigates to the pricing page.
frontend/src/components/ProjectList.tsx: Renders a list of projects with status badges, metadata, and delete confirmation dialogs, or an empty state if no projects exist.
frontend/src/components/RALColorPicker.t: A popover-based color picker that displays a grid of RAL standard colors and lets the user select one, showing the current selection as a color swatch with code and name.
frontend/src/components/SecondaryMembers: A Three.js React component that renders instanced mesh Z-purlins and C-girts for a pre-engineered building model based on bay spacing, dimensions, and roof pitch.
frontend/src/components/ShadowStudy.tsx: A React Three Fiber component that positions a directional shadow-casting light based on a time-of-day value to simulate sun position and shadows.
frontend/src/components/ShadowStudyContr: A UI card with a toggle to enable shadow study mode and a time-of-day slider that formats and displays the selected hour.
frontend/src/components/StripeSetupPanel: An admin-only panel that shows a floating button and dialog for entering a Stripe secret key and allowed countries to configure payment processing.
frontend/src/components/SubscriptionBadg: Renders a small badge indicating whether the user's subscription tier is PRO (amber) or FREE (muted), using appropriate icons.
frontend/src/components/TimelineControls: A React component that renders playback controls (play/pause, skip, slider, step markers) for stepping through a building erection sequence timeline.
A Three.js React component that renders an animated turbo ventilator with a spinning vane group and base cylinder, rotating continuously via useFrame.
frontend/src/components/VideoExportButto: A button component that triggers canvas video recording of the erection animation sequence using the useVideoExport hook, showing recording state and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ViewModeToggle.t: A toggle button component with tooltip that switches between orbit view and first-person building walkthrough mode.
frontend/src/components/WalkthroughContr: A Three.js component that enables first-person WASD keyboard navigation inside the building with pointer lock controls, eye-height clamping, and collision bounds.
frontend/src/components/XBracing.tsx: Renders X-bracing rod meshes on the left and right walls for specified braced bays of a building, using diagonal cylinder geometries.
frontend/src/data/ralColors.ts: Defines a list of 25 RAL color entries (code, name, hex) and exports default color assignments for roof, wall, trim, and structure building components.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDxfParser.ts: A React hook that manages DXF file parsing state, validating file type and size, parsing building elements, and exposing loading/error state with reset capability.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider for ICP, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via React context and AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile, authentication, project CRUD, and Stripe operations. Wraps actor calls with caching and cache invalidation logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoExport.ts: Custom hook that captures a canvas element as a WebM video using the MediaRecorder API and triggers a download when recording stops.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining an industrial dark theme with amber accents using Tailwind and OKLCH CSS variables, plus IBM Plex fonts and utility component classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying the user's projects list, subscription tier, usage stats, and a form to create new projects with a free-tier project limit guard.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page with Internet Identity authentication, featuring a blueprint background, product feature highlights, and redirect to dashboard on successful login.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Payment cancellation/failure page that informs the user no charges were made and provides buttons to retry checkout or return to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Payment success page that verifies the Stripe session status and displays a confirmation of the Pro subscription upgrade with unlocked features.
frontend/src/pages/Pricing.tsx: Renders a two-tier pricing page (Free vs Pro at $29/month) with feature lists, current-plan indicators, and a Stripe checkout flow triggered via the createCheckoutSession mutation.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectViewer.tsx: Full project viewer page that loads a project by ID and composes the 3D BuildingSimulator with tabbed side-panel controls for cladding, accessories, branding, environment, shadow study, clearance checks, and engineering inputs.
frontend/src/utils/calculateBuildingStat: Calculates estimated steel weight, sheeting/roof/wall areas, and design validation status from building dimensions, member sizes, opening data, and load inputs using IS 800/MBMA heuristics.
frontend/src/utils/dxfParser.ts: Client-side ASCII DXF parser that extracts LINE and LWPOLYLINE entities from PEB-relevant layers (columns, rafters, purlins, etc.) and maps them to typed BuildingElement objects with erection order and color metadata.
frontend/src/utils/generateBOQ.ts: Generates a Bill of Quantities (BOQ) item list with part names, quantities, dimensions, and steel weights for columns, rafters, purlins, girts, roof/wall cladding, and openings based on building and member dimensions.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those values via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that enables dark mode, sets up custom fonts (IBM Plex), extends the color palette with oklch-based design tokens (charcoal, steel, amber, sidebar, chart colors), and registers the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for PEB-Sim describing the current version, architectural notes, known issues, required image assets, and a list of all implemented and planned features for the pre-engineered building simulator.
